question: Design a base class `Publication` with private attributes `title` (string) and `price` (double). Implement methods to set and display these. From `Publication`, derive `Book` (adds private attribute `author` - string) and `Magazine` (adds private attribute `issueNumber` - int). Demonstrate creating objects of `Book` and `Magazine` and displaying their complete details.

test_cases.expected:
--- Displaying Complete Details ---

Book Details:
  Title: The C++ Programming Language
  Price: $75.00
  Author: Bjarne Stroustrup

Magazine Details:
  Title: C++ Magazine
  Price: $12.50
  Issue Number: 26

--- Demonstrating setter validation ---
Warning: Price cannot be negative. Setting to 0.
Warning: Issue number must be positive. Setting to 1.

Book Details (after invalid price attempt):
  Title: The C++ Programming Language
  Price: $0.00
  Author: Bjarne Stroustrup

Magazine Details (after invalid issue attempt):
  Title: C++ Magazine
  Price: $12.50
  Issue Number: 1
